name.en: Nevada County General Assistance (cash of last resort)
name.es: Asistencia General del Condado de Nevada (efectivo de último recurso)

value.en: A small county cash grant when nothing else applies — the county sets the (modest) amounts and limits, and it's usually a repayable grant. Costs nothing to call and ask.
value.es: Un pequeño subsidio en efectivo del condado cuando nada más aplica — el condado fija los montos y límites (modestos), y normalmente es un subsidio reembolsable. Llamar y preguntar no cuesta nada.

value.en: Full coverage — doctor, hospital, dental, vision, mental health, prescriptions — free or near-free for most adults under about $1,835/mo (single) or $3,795/mo (family of 4)

value.en: Monthly discounts on name-brand health plans — some plans still as little as $10/mo depending on income. In 2026 help phases out by about $5,216/mo income (single) / $10,716 (family of 4).

value.en: Monthly cash up to $1,233.94 (single) or $2,098.83 (couple) in California for people 65+ or blind/disabled with low income — the state adds a supplement on top of federal SSI
value.es: Dinero mensual de hasta $1,233.94 (soltero) o $2,098.83 (pareja) en California para personas de 65+ o ciegas/con discapacidad y bajos ingresos — el estado añade un suplemento al SSI federal

local.en: Find your Social Security office: ssa.gov/locator · 2-1-1 for local application help
local.es: Encuentre su oficina del Seguro Social: ssa.gov/locator · 2-1-1 para ayuda local con la solicitud

provenance.claim: CA combined SSI/SSP payment standards eff. 2026-01-01 (Rev. 1/26 grid): aged/disabled independent-living $1,233.94 individual ($994.00 federal + $239.94 SSP) / $2,098.83 couple ($1,491.00 + $607.83); blind $1,318.32 / $2,324.35. Federal portion = 2026 FBR $994/$1,491 (2.8% COLA; ssa.gov/oact/cola/SSI.html 403s automated fetchers — FBR arithmetic-confirmed from both CA charts)
provenance.via: wave-1 mixed batch + oracle live re-verification — CDSS ParaReg PDF is the durable effective primary

provenance.claim: Identical standards on the DHCS ACWDL SSI/SSP payment-standards enclosure (original source of record)
provenance.via: wave-1 research fetched it successfully 2026-07-02; 404 at the oracle sweep hours later (DHCS WordPress migration) — retained as source of record, CDSS chart is the durable primary

provenance.claim: SSI countable-resource limit: "The limit for countable resources is $2,000 for an individual and $3,000 for a couple" (home and usually one vehicle excluded) — live page https://www.ssa.gov/ssi/text-resources-ussi.htm (403s automated fetchers)
provenance.via: archive ruling (oracle mixed): immutable timestamped snapshot as source, live URL in claim; snapshot re-fetched and quote verified verbatim by integrator 2026-07-02

name.es: Sección 8 / Vale de Elección de Vivienda (ayuda con la renta)

value.en: When you have a voucher, you pay about 30% of your adjusted income and the voucher pays the rest straight to your landlord. The Nevada County waiting list is CLOSED right now — you can't get in line today, but there are honest next moves.
value.es: Con un vale, usted paga alrededor del 30% de su ingreso ajustado y el vale paga el resto directamente a su arrendador. La lista de espera del condado de Nevada está CERRADA ahora — hoy no es posible anotarse, pero hay pasos honestos que dar.

local.en: Regional Housing Authority (Yuba City; serves Nevada Co.) · office hours Mon-Thu 8am-12pm · watch regionalha.org + local papers for reopening · 2-1-1
local.es: Regional Housing Authority (Yuba City; sirve al condado de Nevada) · horario lun-jue 8am-12pm · vigile regionalha.org y los periódicos locales para la reapertura · 2-1-1

provenance.claim: Waiting list status: "The waiting list for Housing Choice Voucher is CLOSED at this time"; reopening announced via area newspapers + the RHA website; phones 530-671-0220 / 888-671-0220 / TTY 800-927-9275; tenant-payment mechanics (30% adjusted income, up to 40% first year) on the same RHA page
provenance.via: wave-1 mixed batch + oracle live re-verification (linchpin re-fetched; 30/40 mechanics double-sourced here per mixed report)

provenance.claim: HUD FY2026 income limits, Nevada County CA (median $140,400): Very Low (50%) $43,800/1p … $62,550/4p … $82,600/8p; Extremely Low (30%) $26,300/1p … $37,550/4p (ELI 6-8p sit on the 2026 poverty-guideline caps 44,360/50,040/55,720). Monthly values = annual ÷ 12 floored; increment $414 (HUD's +8%-of-4-person rule, floored)
provenance.via: wave-1 mixed batch (workbook parsed directly) + oracle (all 8 floors re-derived; HUD↔ASPE↔fpl-2026.json three-way reproduced)

provenance.claim: Tenant pays ~30% of adjusted monthly income (minimum; up to 40% first year); subsidy paid directly to landlord
provenance.via: ep4 fact-check wave (housing-s8), reused by wave-1; NOT re-fetched in the mixed pass — RHA's own page (row above) double-sources the mechanics

provenance.claim: RHA administers HCV for Colusa, Nevada, Sutter, and Yuba Counties (office: 1455 Butte House Road, Yuba City)
provenance.via: ep4 fact-check wave (housing-s8), reused by wave-1

name.es: Comidas escolares gratis (todo estudiante de TK-12)

value.en: Two free meals a day — breakfast and lunch — for every TK-12 student at public and charter schools, no application and no income requirement
value.es: Dos comidas gratis al día — desayuno y almuerzo — para todo estudiante de TK-12 en escuelas públicas y chárter, sin solicitud y sin requisito de ingresos

local.en: Nothing to sign up for — meals are served at school. Ask your school office about breakfast times.
local.es: No hay que inscribirse — las comidas se sirven en la escuela. Pregunte en la oficina escolar por los horarios del desayuno.

provenance.claim: EC §49501.5 verbatim: school districts, county offices of education, and charter schools "shall make available… a breakfast and… lunch free of charge" to any pupil each school day, regardless of free/reduced-price eligibility
provenance.via: oracle mixed verification — statute is the stronger primary (the CDE page returned a JS shell at sweep time)

provenance.claim: Universal Meals program mechanics: public districts, county offices of education, and charter schools; all TK-12 students; since SY2022-23 (EC §§49501.5, 49564.3)
provenance.via: wave-1 mixed batch (page last reviewed 2025-11-04)

provenance.claim: 2026-27 state budget (signed 2026-06-29) continues universal school meals funding
provenance.via: wave-1 mixed batch + oracle (continuation verbatim); freshness rhythm: re-check each June with the annual budget
